beIN 4K.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five  than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

beIN 4K.original_title: Main Race - F1 Japan Grand Prix - 2026 - FIA Formula 1 World Championship 2026
beIN 4K.title: Main Race - F1 Japan Grand Prix - 2026 - FIA Formula 1 World Championship 2026
beIN 4K.desc:
24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN.
All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary.
The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends.
For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.

beIN 4K.original_title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

beIN 4K.original_title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.
